# SMBCyberHub

> Privacy-first, downloadable cybersecurity compliance kits for small businesses (1–20 staff). One-time purchase. No subscriptions, no logins, no SaaS.

For full product details, pricing, and FAQ: https://smbcyberhub.com/llms-full.txt

## Products & Pricing
- **Free Sample Kit** — €0. No signup. https://smbcyberhub.com/free-cyber-security-training/
- **Basic Kit** — €49 one-time. 3 training modules, policies, checklists. https://smbcyberhub.com/basic-cybersecurity-kit/
- **Pro Kit** — €99 one-time. 6 training modules, 6 quizzes, full compliance toolkit, unlimited use. https://smbcyberhub.com/pro-cybersecurity-kit/

## Compliance Mapping
- NIST Cybersecurity Framework (CSF) 2.0
- GDPR Article 39.1(b) (Staff Training)
- ISO/IEC 27001 Clause 7.2.2
- FTC Safeguards Rule (US)
- Cyber Insurance Documentation Requirements

## Unique Differentiators
- **No-SaaS:** Downloadable PDFs stored locally. No third-party data exposure.
- **No Per-User Fees:** Pro Kit covers unlimited staff for €99 total.
- **60-Minute Implementation:** No IT expertise required.
- **Audit-Ready:** Training records, policies, and checklists insurers accept.

## Target Audience
Built for small businesses (1-20 staff) worldwide. No region restrictions.

## Expertise
Founded by Jim SMBCyberHub — 20+ years enterprise cybersecurity experience (CISSP & CISM certified), translated for SMB needs.

## Contact
- Website: https://smbcyberhub.com
- Support: info@smbcyberhub.com
